name: Fudgy Wudgy Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the unsweetened chocolate and butter in a double boiler over hot water.
2. Allow the mixture to cool slightly.
3. Gradually add sugar to the eggs, beating thoroughly after each addition.
4. Blend in the melted chocolate mixture.
5. Stir in the sifted flour.
6. Add vanilla, half of the chopped walnuts, and half of the semisweet chocolate pieces.
7. Spread the batter evenly into a greased 9-inch square pan.
8. Sprinkle the remaining nuts and semisweet chocolate pieces over the batter.
9. Bake at 325°F for 30 minutes.
10. Remove from the oven and cool in the pan before cutting into squares.
